steps.title: Exploit Perimeter Vulnerability
steps.text: Attacker exploits CVE in public-facing web application to achieve remote code execution.

steps.title: Deploy Web Shell
steps.text: Attacker writes ASPX web shell to web directory for persistent access.

steps.title: Escalate to SYSTEM via Kernel Exploit
steps.text: From IIS AppPool service account, attacker uses PrintSpoofer to escalate to SYSTEM.

steps.title: Move Laterally via RDP/SMB
steps.text: Using SYSTEM credentials, attacker moves to domain controller and file servers.

steps.title: Pivot to Cloud Identity
steps.text: Stolen AD credentials used to authenticate to Azure AD and access cloud services.

steps.title: Exploit Chain Correlation Alert
steps.text: Sentinel correlates web shell creation + lateral movement + identity pivot into Critical alert.

steps.title: CLAW: Contain Exploit Chain
steps.text: Automated playbook isolates host, removes web shells, blocks lateral ports, and blocks attacker IP.

steps.title: Full Chain Investigation
steps.text: SOC maps the complete attack chain: entry point, persistence, privilege escalation, lateral movement, and cloud pivot.

steps.title: Emergency Patching & Resegmentation
steps.text: CISO authorizes emergency patching of perimeter systems and DMZ network resegmentation.

steps.title: Deploy GTR-2025 Defense Controls
steps.text: Apply WAF rules, FIM on web directories, network segmentation, and identity monitoring enhancements.
